po_line_items.description: Repair, adjust and maintenance on the following doors: Entrance door from office to warehouse, replace the damaged lockset, replaced a couple hinge screws with longer ones to hold door tight, tighten all hinge screws and lubed hinges, tighten up door closure screws, lubed and adjusted to close properly.
Restroom door, tighten all the hinge screws and lubed so door will latch
Entrance door, checked all hinge screws and lubed hinges
